name: Curried Beef Stir-Fry
recipeIngredient: 1 tbsp minced gingerroot, or 1 tsp ground ginger
1 lb boneless sirloin steak, cut into 1/8" strips
1 medium green pepper, cut into 1-inch pieces
1 medium sweet red pepper, cut into 1-inch pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, combine soy sauce, garlic, ginger (or ground ginger), and 2 tbsp oil. Add beef; toss to coat. Cover and refrigerate for 15-20 minutes.
2. In a large skillet or wok, heat remaining oil. Stir-fry beef over medium-high heat for 2-3 minutes. Remove beef and set aside.
3. In the same skillet, stir-fry onion for 1 minute; add peppers and celery. Stir-fry for 2 minutes; return beef to skillet.
4. Combine water, cornstarch, and curry powder until smooth. Add to skillet. Bring to a boil and boil for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
5. Serve over rice or noodles.
